name: mansion-ballroom
summary: A grand ballroom — the center is the point, kept clear for dancing. Seating hugs the walls, chandeliers burn overhead, music plays from an alcove.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: large rectangle or oval, empty center

primary_palette.note: the light IS the primary — three great chandeliers in a row, the dance floor below left empty
music-focused — the dais is the orchestra's alcove
royal ballroom — a receiving throne at one end, dancing before it
ornate — a central fountain becomes the axis, dancers circle it

story_prompts: the ball is at its peak — every sconce lit, the dance floor kept clear by tradition
the ball has just ended — servants sweeping petals, a single pair still talking in an alcove
mid-disaster — chandelier crashed, guests scattered, the music abruptly stopped
abandoned decades — chandeliers still hanging, dust sheets on the chairs, mirrors cracked
a masquerade — masks on every face, the killer hidden in plain sight

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright formal (0.6-0.7) — chandelier-flooded, designed to dazzle

anti_patterns: KEEP THE CENTER EMPTY — this is the defining feature. Furniture hugs walls.
chandeliers are metadata lights overhead, not floor props
avoid small furniture clusters in the middle — seating groups only along walls and alcoves
pillars line the walls or frame a colonnade, they don't clutter the dance floor
